title: Bring Blocking Back
description: A small mod reintroducing 1.7's sword blocking animation.
body:
# Bring Blocking Back
Bring Blocking Back (BBB) is a mod that aims to bring back the old sword blocking animation to newer minecraft versions as a simple visual, allowing players who like it to not lose the visual when updating versions.

![Player blocking sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73551f6ed0eef990cf09ac47e59244441c18aea1_0.webp)

This was made mainly with hypixel skyblock in mind, as it has recently updated to modern minecraft versions

## Features
- Config system 
  - Allows the use of items or tags to set what items can be blocked with

## Planned
- Support for skyblock id to be used in config
